city.name: Mexico City
city.description: Configure tu asistente de IA personal en CDMX con OpenClaw. Perfecto para la escena tech de Mexico.
city.localFlavor: Mexico City's startup ecosystem is exploding. OpenClaw gives you enterprise-grade AI automation without enterprise prices - perfect for the resourceful CDMX founder.

relatedCities.name: London
relatedCities.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in London with OpenClaw. Built for the UK tech ecosystem.
relatedCities.localFlavor: From Shoreditch startups to City finance, London runs on efficiency. OpenClaw automates your workflows while keeping your data on servers you control - GDPR-friendly by design.

relatedCities.name: Miami
relatedCities.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in Miami with OpenClaw. Perfect for Miami tech and crypto founders.
relatedCities.localFlavor: Miami's tech scene moves fast. OpenClaw keeps up - automating your operations while you focus on building. Self-hosted means your data stays yours, not in some VC's hands.

relatedCities.name: New York City
relatedCities.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in NYC with OpenClaw. Built for the pace of New York.
relatedCities.localFlavor: New York doesn't sleep, and neither does your OpenClaw. From fintech in FiDi to startups in Brooklyn, your AI assistant handles the grind while you handle the deals.
